tool_input.failure_reason: Maximum electrostatic_relative_error (0.083) exceeds the <0.02 tolerance; mean (0.034) also exceeds it.
tool_input.rationale: The digest shows electrostatic_relative_error with max=0.083, mean=0.034, median=0.031, and min=0.012. The claim's tolerance requires electrostatic_relative_error < 0.02 across all structures. The max of 0.083 violates this bound (0.083 > 0.02), and even the mean (0.034) and min (0.012... wait, min satisfies but max does not). Specifically, the maximum value 0.083 directly contradicts the tolerance of < 0.02.
